message:
✨ Add anchor IDs and deep-link navigation to Settings sections (#602)

Added id attributes to all settings sections for deep linking:
- profile-settings, agent-settings, theme-settings, accessibility-settings
- permissions-settings, prediction-settings, widget-settings, notifications-settings
- api-keys-settings, token-usage-settings, ai-mode-settings

Added useEffect handler in Settings.tsx that:
- Reads URL hash on mount
- Scrolls to matching section smoothly
- Adds temporary highlight ring effect

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
